scripts.build: npm run build -w @skillcheck/core && npm run build -w skillcheck && npm run build -w @skillcheck/web
scripts.check: npm run check -w @skillcheck/core && npm run build -w @skillcheck/core && npm run check -w skillcheck && npm run check -w @skillcheck/web
scripts.scan: npm run build -w @skillcheck/core && npm run build -w skillcheck && node packages/cli/dist/index.js scan
